text:
The Underground Lake (, Chitei-ko) is a lake located in the Republic of East Gorteau. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 23, Chapter 237 

Overview

The lake is the place where Killua Zoldyck faced off briefly against, Ikalgo and a swarm of Chimera Ants, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 23, Chapter 238 and finally against the Ortho Siblings. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 23, Chapter 239 Hunter × Hunter - Volume 23, Chapter 240 

Inhabitants

The lake is underground, and trees grow underwater. Ikalgo, Remora, and the Ortho Siblings (including their squads), who all carry the genes of water animals, can be found in this lake. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

Trying to lose Flutter, Killua falls into this lake while fighting Ikalgo, who is almost eaten by his own grunts, but is saved by Killua. Later on, Remora sneaks up behind Killua and attaches a badge that activates the Ortho Siblings' ability, Dart De Darts, and engage in a battle. After Killua is severely wounded and near death, Ikalgo takes him along a path that leads to a secret hospital. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 23, Chapter 241
